text:
1. Verify the claim by consulting a reliable geographical database or encyclopedia (e.g., World Atlas, Britannica) to confirm that the Amazon River is indeed listed as the second longest river, and that the Nile is the longest. [doc_amazon]
2. Cross-reference the measurement of the Amazon's length from at least two independent scientific sources to ensure the metric is consistent and not disputed (e.g., some sources argue the Amazon is longer than the Nile depending on the source and tributary considered). [doc_amazon]
